_comment: Reference definition of the EventBridge rule that triggers the orchestrator Lambda on a schedule. This is provided as documentation of the exact rule shape — aws/eventbridge/deploy.py creates this via boto3 rather than requiring a separate CloudFormation/Terraform deploy, but the rate expression and target shape here are what that script creates.
Name: asset-health-scheduled-assessment
Description: Triggers the agent orchestrator Lambda to assess all machines on a fixed interval
_comment_schedule: rate(15 minutes) matches the original Phase 6 roadmap's 'every 15 minutes per machine' goal. Adjust based on real sensor sampling rate — for the 5-minute sampling interval used in data/generate_sensor_data.py, every 15 minutes means the agent sees 3 fresh readings per run, which is enough to detect a developing fault without invoking the agent (and spending Claude API tokens) on every single new data point.
_comment_target: The Arn above is a placeholder — deploy.py fills in the real function ARN after creating the orchestrator Lambda (aws/eventbridge/orchestrator deploy step), then adds the matching Lambda resource-based policy granting EventBridge permission to invoke it (lambda:AddPermission with Principal=events.amazonaws.com).
